title: ParseContextDisciplineSurfaced payload
description: Emitted by the parse_context handler on every call that ran the intent → discipline surfacing pass (chain parse-context-lean-orienting T7). T10's measurement consumes the event for fire-rate, dedup-rate, opt-out-rate, and recent-fire-suppression-rate dashboards. The four arrays partition the would-fire discipline set across the four observable outcomes so T10 can validate the noise-budget rule under live traffic.

intent_shape.description: The directive intent that drove this pass. Always one of the discipline-firing set today (verify/implement/fix/audit); explain/summarize/status/list/none never appear here because the resolver short-circuits on those shapes per T7's docs-shape constraint. Kept as the full vocabulary so future expansion doesn't need a schema bump.

disciplines_surfaced.description: Discipline names that surfaced as ResolvedReferences in this envelope. Capped at 2 per envelope per T7's noise-budget rule.

disciplines_suppressed_by_dedup.description: Discipline names that would have surfaced via intent-mapping but were already in the envelope via keyword-triggered surfacing. Keyword wins; intent-map defers.

disciplines_suppressed_by_optout.description: Discipline names suppressed because the message matched the opt-out pattern ("don't worry about disciplines", "skip the linters", etc.).

disciplines_suppressed_by_recent_fire.description: Discipline names suppressed because the (session, intent, discipline) tuple fired within the last 5 minutes. Prevents repeat-firing under back-to-back work on the same intent shape.
